chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6020 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.1924/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on CMA No.28120/2023 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 1st February 2024 None present. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner and his counsel are called absent, no intimation is received. On the last date of hearing also, no one was in attendance on behalf of the petitioner. It appears that petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
